message:
fix(io): soften Lines repoll guard from panic to cached None return

Change Lines stream repoll-after-completion behavior from assert-panic
to returning Poll::Ready(None), consistent with standard stream
fused semantics. Repolling a completed stream should be safe (return
None) rather than crashing the runtime, since callers may not track
stream exhaustion precisely.

Update tests: rename from _panics to _returns_none, replace
catch_unwind assertions with direct Poll::Ready(None) matches,
verify idempotent None on third poll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
